title: CAMRI Gold Teaspoons Set of 6 – Stainless Steel Tea Spoons, 5.3 inches, Golden Mirror Finishing Teaspoon for Dessert & Coffee, Sturdy, Cutlery Spoon Set for Home & Restaurant(C37-6 Pcs)
features: MULTI-PURPOSE USE: The gold dessert tea spoons are perfect for use in restaurants, cafes, and at home for coffee, tea, dessert, ice cream, cereal, and much more.

EXQUISITE DESIGN: CAMRI Gold teaspoons have a shiny, sleek, and golden finish, which will give your dining table a luxurious look. These spoons have a modern, yet timeless design that will impress your guests and add a touch of sophistication to your table setting.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: CAMRI gold dessert spoons are made of high-quality stainless steel, which is safe, healthy, and durable. These spoons are rust-resistant, and won’t bend or break easily, providing long-lasting use.
EASY TO CLEAN: These dessert spoons are easy to clean and dishwasher safe. Simply place them in the dishwasher, and they will come out looking as good as new.
6-PIECE SET: This set includes 6 gold dessert spoons with a length of 13.6 CM
description: Product Description CAMRI Gold Tea Spoon Set of 6 Pcs Are you looking for a way to elevate your dining experience? Look no further than the CAMRI Gold Teaspoons Set of 6! These stainless steel tea spoons are the perfect addition to any kitchen, with their golden mirror finishing that is sure to impress your guests. Not only do they look great, but they are also very durable and corrosion-resistant. The simple design of this flatware set adds a sense of style and elegance to your table, and the comfortable and well-balanced grip makes it ideal for both adults and children. So why wait? Get your CAMRI Gold Teaspoons Set of 6 now and enjoy the perfect dining experience! Measurement Weight & Lenght Of Each Spoon Model C61 Gold: 19 Grams / Lenght : 5.19 in. Model C37 Gold: 32 Grams / Lenght : 5.3 in. Model C62 Gold: 26 Grams / Lenght : 6.2 in.
